title: Tempting Umami Korean Tofu Bowl
description: A savory Korean dish featuring crispy tofu, sweet cherry, and a blend of umami flavors, served in a hot dolsot stone bowl, perfect for a hangover cure.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Prepare the ice bath by filling a large bowl with crushed ice and a little water.
In a blender or food processor, blend gochujang, soy sauce, and rice vinegar to make the umami sauce.
In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium heat and cook the tofu cubes until golden brown.
Shock the cooked tofu in the prepared ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In the same skillet, add the halved cherry tomatoes and cook until they start to release their juices.
Add the blended umami sauce to the skillet and stir to combine with the cherry tomatoes.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the cooked tofu in a hot dolsot stone bowl, followed by a spoonful of the umami cherry tomato sauce.
Top the dish with shredded mozzarella cheese and place the bowl under the broiler until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped green onions, toasted sesame seeds, and a sprinkle of sesame oil.
Serve immediately and enjoy the cheese pull.
